case_title: MEDINA, DELIA VS REV. MSGR SAINT CHARLES CHURCH et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-10-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-06-2002 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDINA, DELIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REV. MSGR SAINT CHARLES CHURCH RODRIGUEZ, JOSE A. MARANATHA TOURS INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
